findings.location: s1 — code example, else if branch comment
findings.description: The code comment in the `else if (version == 2)` branch was changed from the source's `// バージョン1の場合の処理` to `// バージョン2の場合の処理`. While the source appears to contain a copy-paste error, the knowledge file altered the actual source content.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `} else if (version == 2) { // バージョン1の場合の処理 }` — Knowledge file: `} else if (version == 2) { // バージョン2の場合の処理 }`

findings.description: The parameter type was silently corrected from `java.lang.Strng` (as written in the source) to `java.lang.String`. The source contains a typo that the knowledge file fixed without basis.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:param java.lang.Strng workflowId:` — Knowledge file: `| workflowId | java.lang.String | ワークフローID |`

findings.location: s5 — code example, Map type declaration
findings.description: The Map generic type was silently corrected from `Map<Stirng, String>` (source typo) to `Map<String, String>`. The knowledge file introduced content not present in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `Map<Stirng, String> parameter = new HashMap<String, String>();` — Knowledge file: `Map<String, String> parameter = new HashMap<String, String>();`
